positive: Minimalist abstract jungle foliage pattern, featuring stylized monstera leaves, tropical palms, and curling vines, arranged in a repeating, seamless pattern. The composition should utilize strong black silhouettes against a bright, solid cream background. The style is sophisticated, retro-modern graphic design, resembling mid-century screen printing artwork. Use high contrast, deep forest greens, and subtle touches of burnt orange. Central composition suitable for full-coverage apparel printing. Clean linework, crisp edges, vector aesthetic.
